title: Standard Operating Procedure for Scientific Product Appraisal

explainability.purpose: Standardizes the clinical and commercial evaluation of new pharmaceutical developments.
explainability.limitations: Appraisal is dependent on published research data accuracy.
explainability.governanceControls: Double-signature peer review is required prior to release.

steps.instruction: Retrieve primary randomized clinical trial publications from database.
Extract efficacy data (PFS, OS) and safety warnings.
Compile SWOT matrix and competitor differentiation tables.
Route the final appraisal draft to medical director for signature.

content:
# SOP-MA-001: Standard Scientific Product Appraisal
## 1. Purpose
Establishes procedures for evaluating clinical trials and market positioning.
## 2. Procedure
1. Retrieve trials. 2. Extract endpoints. 3. Compile SWOT. 4. Obtain approvals.
